attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICE_METHOD_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.METHOD_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TRANSACTION_TABLE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.RATE_SET_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ACTIVITY_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DATA_SOURCE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SQL_BUILD_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ATTRIBUTE_SET_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.BASE_VAL_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.BASE_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ARQC1_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ARQC2_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.OWNER_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PARTNER_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.EXCHANGE_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TO_CURR_INDICATOR, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TO_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.GIVEN_ADJUSTMENT_RATE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.EXTENDED_VALUES, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_NO_ADJUSTMENT_RATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_BASE_VAL_ZERO, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_IC_PRICE_ZERO, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_DI_NOT_FOUND, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_DI_TOO_MANY_FOUND, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_VAL_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_VAL_NOT_ZERO, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_VAL_EXTENDED, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DIAGNOSTICS_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_DIAGNOSTICS_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.MD_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ADJ_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICING_CALCULATION, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICING_PRECISION_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICING_EXTENDED, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.FORMULA_SET_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_FORMULA_SET_FAILS, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SS_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD,
 (
 select PRICE_METHOD_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD
 minus
 select PRICE_METHOD_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PRICE_METHOD_ID = STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICE_METHOD_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.REFRESH_DATETIME
